children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Reads source config from pipeline_request, fetches data from CSV/JSON/API, parses into records, writes to raw_data, logs step to pipeline_log

global_vars.description: Write parsed records to raw_data store

constraints.description: Must handle malformed records without crashing

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid records are written to raw_data
Ingestion step is logged in pipeline_log

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, store in processed_data, skip malformed records
children.behavior: Reads raw_data and transform_config, applies rules field by field, writes valid results to processed_data, logs step with counts

constraints.description: Malformed records must be skipped without failure

acceptance_criteria.description: All valid transformed records are written to processed_data
Transformation step is logged in pipeline_log

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, assign quality_score, mark invalid records
children.behavior: Reads processed_data, applies quality rules (e.g., completeness, range checks), computes quality_score per record, marks invalid records, logs step

global_vars.description: Read processed records and update with quality_score and validity marks

data_operations.description: Read and update records with quality metadata

constraints.description: Must assign quality_score as float between 0 and 1

acceptance_criteria.description: All records in processed_data have quality_score and validity marks
Validation step is logged in pipeline_log

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output in requested format, log export
children.behavior: Reads processed_data, filters to only validated records, formats as CSV or JSON, writes to pipeline_result, logs step

global_vars.description: Read processed records to filter validated ones

constraints.description: Only validated records should be exported

acceptance_criteria.description: Exported data contains only validated records
Export step is logged in pipeline_log

governance_notes: Parent global variables conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData (write) + TransformData (read); processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData (write) + ValidateData (read_write) + ExportData (read); pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all four children (each writes). No parent operation dropped.
